name: feature_004_structured_summary_output
description: Add a summary field that appears in programmatic audit results, widget payloads, and CLI output formats.
reference_solution_notes: Category rationale: this remains small feature work because it adds a new structured summary field across reporting surfaces instead of repairing an incorrect existing field. It is harder now because both widget consumers and CLI output must carry the same summary while preserving the original first-line text contract.
mutability_notes: Weakness addressed: the original task was easy to satisfy by patching one return dict. The hardened version now catches shallow fixes that update only the CLI or only run_audit without propagating summary data into downstream programmatic consumers.
